website_development.heading: Our Website Development Services
website_development.description: At Devtrios, we're a website development company delivering professional website development services for businesses that need speed, scalability, and measurable results. We provide end-to-end website development services for startups, growing companies, and established businesses. From strategy and UX to development, optimisation, and long-term support, our websites are built to scale with your business, not limit it. Each solution below is delivered with performance, SEO, and maintainability in mind.

services.title: WordPress Website Development
services.description: We build custom WordPress websites that are fast, secure, and easy to manage. Our WordPress development focuses on clean architecture, performance optimisation, and SEO-friendly structures, giving you full control without sacrificing speed or scalability.
services.idealFor: content-driven businesses, service providers, and marketing-led teams that need flexibility without technical complexity.

services.title: Shopify Website Development
services.description: Our Shopify development services help brands launch and scale high-converting eCommerce stores. From custom themes and UX optimisation to payment gateways and third-party integrations, we build Shopify stores designed to increase conversions and average order value.
services.idealFor: brands that want reliable performance with room to grow.

services.title: Custom E-Commerce Website Development
services.description: For businesses that need more than off-the-shelf solutions, we deliver custom eCommerce website development tailored to your products, workflows, and customers. We focus on security, performance, and conversion optimisation across every touchpoint.

services.title: Landing Page Development for Lead Generation
services.description: We design and develop high-converting landing pages built for paid traffic, campaigns, and product launches. Every landing page is structured around user intent, speed, and conversion psychology, ensuring maximum ROI from your traffic.
services.idealFor: marketing campaigns, SaaS launches, and lead generation funnels.

services.title: Custom Website Development
services.description: When templates aren't enough, we deliver fully custom website development using modern frameworks and clean codebases. These solutions are built for unique functionality, complex integrations, and long-term scalability.
services.bestFor: businesses with specific technical requirements or growth plans.

services.title: Webflow Website Development
services.description: Our Webflow development services combine design freedom with clean performance. We build visually refined, fast-loading Webflow websites that are easy to maintain and optimised for SEO and responsiveness.
services.ideal: design-led brands and marketing teams that value speed and flexibility.

services.title: Website Maintenance and Support Services
services.description: A website should evolve, not decay. Our website maintenance services keep your site secure, updated, and performing at its best. We handle updates, monitoring, backups, and ongoing improvements so your team can focus on growth.

crm_development.heading: Our CRM Development Services
crm_development.description: End-to-end CRM development, customisation, and integration services designed around how your business actually operates.

services.title: Custom CRM Development
services.description: We design and build bespoke CRM platforms tailored to your sales cycles, pipelines, and internal processes. Ideal for businesses outgrowing off-the-shelf tools or needing full ownership of data and workflows.

services.title: CRM Customisation & Extensions
services.description: Already using a CRM but hitting limitations? We extend and customise existing systems to fit your workflows, reduce friction, and eliminate workarounds that slow teams down.

services.title: CRM Automation & Workflow Engineering
services.description: Automate lead routing, follow-ups, task assignments, notifications, and reporting. Our automation-first approach improves speed, accuracy, and consistency across teams.

services.title: CRM Integrations
services.description: We integrate your CRM with marketing tools, finance systems, customer support platforms, analytics tools, and internal software, creating a single source of truth across the business.

services.title: Sales & Pipeline Management Systems
services.description: Design structured pipelines that reflect how deals actually move. We build CRM logic that supports forecasting, deal health tracking, and sales accountability.

services.title: Customer Data & Reporting Dashboards
services.description: Clear, role-based dashboards for sales leaders, operations, and executives. No clutter, no vanity metrics, just decision-ready data.

mobile_app_development.heading: Our Mobile App Development Services
mobile_app_development.description: We provide end-to-end mobile app development services, from strategy and design to development and ongoing support.

services.title: iOS App Development
services.description: High-performance iOS apps built for iPhone and iPad using modern Apple standards, optimised for security, performance, and App Store compliance.

services.title: Android App Development
services.description: Custom Android applications designed to perform consistently across devices, screen sizes, and OS versions.

services.title: Cross-Platform App Development
services.description: We build cross-platform apps using technologies such as Flutter to deliver native-like performance on both iOS and Android from a single codebase.

services.title: Mobile App UI & UX Design
services.description: Intuitive, engaging app design focused on usability, retention, and clear user flows.

services.title: Mobile App Maintenance & Support
services.description: Ongoing support covering updates, performance monitoring, bug fixes, and feature enhancements.

ui_ux_design.heading: Our UI & UX Design Services
ui_ux_design.description: End-to-end design services aligned with product strategy, user needs, and development reality.

services.title: UX Research
services.description: We start by understanding users before designing anything. Our UX research focuses on how real users behave, where they struggle, and what blocks them from taking action. This insight becomes the foundation for every design decision that follows.

services.title: UI Design
services.description: Clean, consistent, and purpose-driven interfaces. Our UI design services focus on clarity, hierarchy, and usability across devices. Every visual decision supports comprehension, trust, and interaction.
includes_list: Responsive layouts for web and mobile

services.title: UX Audit
services.description: Identify what’s broken, what’s slowing users down, and what’s costing you conversions. Our UX audit services analyse existing products to uncover usability issues, friction points, and missed opportunities. You get clear, prioritised recommendations, not vague observations.

services.title: Wireframing & Prototyping
services.description: Test ideas early. Reduce build risk. We create wireframes and interactive prototypes to validate structure, flows, and assumptions before development begins. This saves time, cost, and rework later.
includes_list: Clickable prototypes for testing and feedback

services.title: Design Systems
services.description: Build consistent, scalable products without design debt. Our design system services create a single source of truth for UI components, patterns, and rules—faster delivery, visual consistency, and seamless design-development collaboration.
includes_list: UI component libraries and design tokens

services.title: Product Design
services.description: Design products that scale, convert, and endure. Our product design services focus on building digital products that users understand quickly, adopt naturally, and continue using—from early-stage MVPs to mature SaaS platforms.
includes_list: UX-led product design and UI for digital products

blockchain_development.heading: Our Blockchain Development Services
blockchain_development.description: We provide end-to-end blockchain development services covering strategy, design, development, security, and ongoing support.

services.title: Smart Contract Development
services.description: Secure, gas-optimised smart contracts built for automation, accuracy, and long-term reliability across leading blockchain networks.

services.title: Web3 Application Development
services.description: Decentralised Web3 applications with wallet integration, secure data handling, and user-friendly interfaces designed for adoption.

services.title: NFT Platform Development
services.description: End-to-end NFT solutions including minting platforms, marketplaces, metadata handling, and smart contract logic.

services.title: Crypto Wallet Development & Integration
services.description: Custom wallets and wallet integrations enabling secure asset storage, transactions, authentication, and Web3 access.

services.title: Smart Contract Audits & Security Reviews
services.description: In-depth audits to identify vulnerabilities, optimise performance, and ensure contract integrity before deployment.

software_development.heading: Our Software Development Solutions
software_development.description: We offer end-to-end software development services that cover the entire product lifecycle—from idea validation and architecture to deployment and continuous support.

services.title: Custom Software Development
services.description: Tailor-made software solutions built to address your specific business workflows, user requirements, and challenges. Whether it's a desktop solution or a complex enterprise system, we design software that works for you.

services.title: Web Application Development
services.description: Build secure, high-performance web applications that are scalable, intuitive, and ready for integrations. We focus on seamless user experiences, performance optimization, and robust security.

services.title: SaaS Development
services.description: End-to-end development of SaaS products, including architecture, multi-tenancy, subscription billing systems, security protocols, and scalability. We help bring your SaaS vision to life with the flexibility and growth potential your business needs.

services.title: MVP Development
services.description: Get your product to market faster with a lean, cost-effective MVP. We focus on validating your idea, attracting early users, and securing investment so you can scale with confidence.

services.title: API Development & Integration
services.description: Develop secure and scalable APIs that allow different systems, applications, and platforms to communicate seamlessly. We integrate APIs with your existing infrastructure for smooth data flow and functionality.

ai_automation.heading: What We Deliver with AI & Automation
ai_automation.description: Our AI and automation services are designed to function as a connected capability stack. Each service can stand alone, but delivers the greatest impact when architected as part of a broader system.

cta.text: Book a Free AI Strategy Call

services.title: AI Chatbots
services.description: Intelligent conversational systems for customer support, sales, and internal teams. Built with natural language understanding, contextual memory, and real integrations.

services.title: AI Agents
services.description: Task-driven AI agents that reason, plan, and execute actions across tools, APIs, and systems. Designed to automate workflows, not just respond to prompts.

services.title: Agentic AI
services.description: Advanced AI system design focused on autonomy, multi-step reasoning, and agent orchestration. Built for organisations that need decision-making systems, not isolated models.

services.title: LLM Development
services.description: Custom and fine-tuned large language models deployed securely for enterprise use cases. Designed for accuracy, governance, and long-term scalability.

services.title: Automation & Workflow Engineering
services.description: AI-driven automation that removes manual work across operations, finance, sales, and support using APIs, RPA, and intelligent orchestration.

services.title: Generative AI
services.description: Production-ready generative AI solutions for content generation, internal tools, data synthesis, and decision support with governance built in.

seo_services.heading: Our SEO Services
seo_services.description: End to end SEO built around how search engines and buyers actually behave.

services.title: Technical SEO
services.description: We fix what search engines see first. Site architecture, crawlability, Core Web Vitals, indexing issues, schema, internal linking, and technical debt. Technical SEO creates the foundation that everything else depends on.

services.title: On Page SEO
services.description: We optimise pages for relevance, clarity, and intent alignment. This includes content structure, metadata, internal linking, topical depth, and UX signals that directly influence rankings and engagement.

services.title: Local SEO
services.description: Designed for businesses that depend on geographic visibility. We optimise Google Business Profiles, citations, local landing pages, reviews, and map presence to drive inbound demand from nearby customers.

services.title: E Commerce SEO
services.description: SEO frameworks built for scale. Product and category optimisation, faceted navigation handling, internal linking systems, index control, and conversion focused optimisation designed specifically for online stores.

services.title: International SEO
services.description: For businesses expanding across regions and languages. Hreflang strategy, regional site structure, localisation, and market specific keyword targeting that avoids cannibalisation and duplication issues.

services.title: Enterprise SEO
services.description: Built for large sites and complex organisations. Governance, automation, reporting, and scalable optimisation frameworks designed to work across thousands of pages and multiple stakeholders.

services.title: SEO Audits & Strategy
services.description: Clarity before execution. We deliver deep technical, content, and authority audits followed by a prioritised roadmap that focuses on impact, not busywork.

services.title: Link Building & Authority Growth
services.description: Authority built properly. We earn high quality, relevant links through white hat outreach and digital PR. No shortcuts, no spam, no risk to your domain.
